title: Bookling Gear
description: Library and in game configuration for Eruannie_9's mods
body: Library mod for my mods. The mod include set of different registries for blocks, items, blockentities and other refractored methods to make the registry an easier and more clean process. The mod also adds a new buttom to access in game configuration and change it without the need of leaving or restarting the game. The configuration works only with Eruannie's mods.
